heading: Award of operating agreements
label: 53403 Award of operating agreements
notes: Amendments2022—Subsec. (c). substituted “The Secretary” for “For any fiscal year, the Secretary” and “more than—” for “more than 10 vessels”, designated existing provisions as introductory provisions, and added pars. (1) and (2).Pub. L. 117–263
amendments: Amendments2022—Subsec. (c). substituted “The Secretary” for “For any fiscal year, the Secretary” and “more than—” for “more than 10 vessels”, designated existing provisions as introductory provisions, and added pars. (1) and (2).Pub. L. 117–263

children.heading: .—In General
children.label: a .—In General
children.text: The Secretary of Transportation shall require, as a condition of including any vessel in the Fleet, that the program participant of the vessel enter into an operating agreement with the Secretary under this section.

children.heading: .—Eligible vessels
children.label: 1 .—Eligible vessels
children.text: The Secretary of Transportation shall accept an application for an operating agreement for an eligible product tank vessel under the priority under paragraph (2) only from a person that has authority to enter into an operating agreement under this chapter.

children.label: A
children.text: vessel capabilities, as established by the Secretary of Defense; then

children.label: B
children.text: after consideration of vessel type, according to an applicant’s record of owning and operating vessels; then

children.label: C
children.text: after consideration of ownership and operation, according to such additional priorities as the Secretary of Transportation may consider appropriate.

children.heading: .—Concurrence of award
children.label: 3 .—Concurrence of award
children.text: The Secretary of Transportation may not approve an application for an operating agreement without the concurrence of the Secretary of Defense.
for each of fiscal years 2022 and 2023, 10 vessels; and
for any subsequent fiscal year, 20 vessels.

children.heading: .—Judicial Review
children.label: d .—Judicial Review
children.text: No court shall have jurisdiction to review the Secretary’s decision with respect to the award or non-award of an operating agreement issued under this chapter.
